Camera-IMU calibration

Reprojection error (cam0):
        mean: 0.32 [px]
        std:  0.41 [px]

        mean: 0.30 [px]
        std:  0.45 [px]

Gyroscope error:
        mean: 0.0008 [rad/s]
        std:  0.0021 [rad/s]
